product_overview: Hairconnekt is a two-sided marketplace mobile application connecting independent hair service providers (stylists, barbers, braiders) with clients. It streamlines booking, payment handling, and business management for beauty professionals, while offering clients easy discovery and appointment booking with local hair professionals.
core_goals: Connect independent hair service providers with clients effectively.
Provide a seamless booking and payment experience for clients.
Enable providers to manage their schedules, services, and business efficiently.
Support provider growth through marketing tools and analytics.
Ensure secure authentication and data handling for all users.
key_features: Provider Registration Flow: A comprehensive 5-step process capturing personal info, business details, services, verification, and summary for providers.
Service Management: Allow providers to add, edit, and delete services with validation and state management.
Authentication: Secure login and session management for users.
Provider Dashboard: Manage appointments, services, and profile settings from a centralized dashboard.

Client App Features: Onboarding, local provider discovery via map and filtered search, style galleries for inspiration, bookings with real-time availability, secure payments, favorites, reviews, appointments, and messaging.
Provider App Features: Dashboard analytics, calendar management of availability, portfolio uploads, financials including earnings and vouchers, and subscription tiers for monetization.
user_flow_summary: Providers complete a 5-step registration capturing required business and personal details before activating their profile.
Providers manage their service offerings through an intuitive service management screen allowing CRUD operations.
Clients onboard by registering securely, explore nearby providers via map and filters, select desired styles, book appointments with real-time availability, and pay securely.
Providers use their dashboard to monitor appointments and financials, manage calendars, upload portfolios, and adjust subscription settings.
Both clients and providers access and manage their profiles, communicate via in-app messaging, and review appointment histories.
validation_criteria: Provider registration correctly collects and validates all required inputs through all 5 registration steps.
Service management screens perform accurate CRUD operations and enforce UUID validation for service records.
Authentication mechanisms securely handle login, session persistence, and token storage.
Booking flows must properly reflect real-time availability and process payments without errors.
Provider dashboard components display accurate appointment data, financial summaries, and allow seamless profile and service updates.
Client-side features such as map search, filters, favorites, and messaging operate smoothly and securely.
Subscription and monetization flows enforce proper feature access and commission rates based on user plans.

features.name: Provider Registration Flow
features.description: A 5-step registration process for service providers including personal info, business details, services, verification uploads, and summary.

features.name: Service Management
features.description: Screens for listing, adding, editing, and deleting services offered by a provider. Includes UUID validation and state management.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login and authentication flow handling user sessions and secure storage.

features.name: Provider Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard for providers to manage appointments, services, and profile settings.
